About.subtitle: About Us
About.description: More than a decade connecting travelers with the Dominican Republic
About.storyP1: Founded with a deep passion for sharing the real beauty and culture of the Dominican Republic, D.R All Season Travel has been creating unforgettable experiences for travelers from all over the world for more than 12 years.
About.storyP2: Based in Punta Cana, we're not just another ride, we're a team of professional drivers who know every road, every shortcut, and every hidden gem of this country like the back of our hand. To us, a transfer isn't about just getting you from the airport to the hotel; it's about making you feel the Dominican vibe the second you step off the plane, arriving relaxed, safe, and already wearing a smile that lasts the whole trip.
About.storyP3: We offer everything from private airport transfers to full-day adventures, always with the same goal: let you experience the most authentic side of our island, stress-free and with all the warmth we've got to give.
About.storyP4: And there's one little thing we always ask our guests (it's kind of our tradition): when you make it home safe and sound, just shoot us a quick message saying "I'm home." That tiny note makes our whole team ridiculously happy and lets us know we did our job right.
About.storyP5: So whether you're here for the beaches, the culture, or just to soak up the sun, D.R All Season Travel is here to make sure your trip starts and ends with a big dose of Dominican hospitality.
About.storyP6: Because for everyone at D.R All Season Travel, nothing matters more than you having the best vacation possible, falling in love with the Dominican Republic, and heading home already planning your next trip back.
About.missionText: To provide exceptional travel experiences that showcase the authentic beauty, culture, and warmth of the Dominican Republic while exceeding every guest's expectations.
About.sustainabilityText: We're committed to responsible tourism that protects our environment and supports local communities, ensuring the Dominican Republic remains beautiful for generations.
About.excellenceText: From professional guides to modern vehicles, we maintain the highest standards in every aspect of our service to deliver experiences that exceed expectations.
About.localExpertiseText: Our guides are born and raised in the Dominican Republic, offering authentic insights and access to hidden gems tourists rarely see.
About.safetyText: Fully licensed, insured, and compliant with all safety regulations. Your security and wellbeing are our top priorities.
About.pricingText: No hidden fees, no surprises. What you see is what you pay—all-inclusive, straightforward pricing.
About.supportText: Our team is available around the clock to assist you before, during, and after your experience.
About.smallGroupsText: We keep group sizes manageable to ensure personalized attention and a more intimate experience.
About.flexibilityText: Free cancellation, easy rescheduling, and customizable itineraries to fit your travel plans.
About.ctaDescription: Let us show you the authentic Dominican Republic

FAQ.subtitle: FAQ
FAQ.title: Questions & answers
FAQ.description: Find answers to common questions about our tours, transfers, and services
FAQ.stillHaveQuestionsDesc: Our team is here to help you with any questions about our services.
FAQ.q1: How do I book a tour or transfer?
FAQ.a1: You can book directly through our website by clicking the "Book Now" button on any tour or transfer page. You can also contact us via phone, email, or WhatsApp for personalized assistance.
FAQ.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
FAQ.a2: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) and cash payments. All services can be paid upon arrival — no upfront payment required.
FAQ.q3: Do I need to pay in advance?
FAQ.a3: No! All services can be paid upon arrival. Simply book today and pay when you arrive using credit card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) or cash. Zero financial risk.
FAQ.q4: Are prices per person or per group?
FAQ.a4: Tour and excursion prices are per person. Transfer prices are fixed for groups of 1-4 passengers, with additional charges for 5+ passengers.
FAQ.q5: What is included in the tour price?
FAQ.a5: All tours include round-trip transportation, professional bilingual guides, entrance fees to attractions, and any meals specified in the itinerary. Check each tour's "What's Included" section for specifics.
FAQ.a6: Most of our tours are family-friendly. However, some activities like zip-lining have age and weight restrictions. Check the specific tour requirements or contact us for recommendations.
FAQ.q7: What should I bring on a tour?
FAQ.a7: Generally, bring comfortable clothing, sunscreen, insect repellent, a camera, and cash for tips and personal purchases. Specific requirements are listed on each tour page.
FAQ.a8: Yes! We can arrange private tours for individuals, families, or groups. Contact us for custom itineraries and pricing.
FAQ.a9: Your driver will meet you at the airport arrivals area holding a sign with your name. We track your flight, so if there are delays, your driver will adjust accordingly. No extra charges for flight delays.
FAQ.q10: What if I have extra luggage?
FAQ.a10: Our vehicles have ample space for standard luggage (2 bags per person). If you have oversized items like surfboards or golf clubs, please let us know when booking.
FAQ.q11: Can I make stops during my transfer?
FAQ.a11: Yes, additional stops can be arranged (grocery store, ATM, etc.) for a small extra fee. Mention this when booking or contact your driver.
FAQ.a12: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before your scheduled activity. Cancellations within 24 hours or no-shows are non-refundable. Weather-related cancellations are fully refundable.
FAQ.q13: What if the weather is bad?
FAQ.a13: Safety first! If weather conditions make an activity unsafe, we'll offer to reschedule or provide a full refund. We monitor weather closely and will notify you in advance.
FAQ.a14: Yes, rescheduling is free if done at least 24 hours before your original booking. Subject to availability.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.section1Intro: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, book a tour or transfer, or communicate with us. This includes:
Privacy.section1Item1: Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, hotel information
Privacy.section1Item2: Payment Information: Processed securely through Azul Payment Gateway (we do not store full credit card details)
Privacy.section1Item3: Booking Details: Service dates, number of guests, special requests
Privacy.section1Item4: Communication Data: Chat messages, emails, and support requests
Privacy.section1Item5: Technical Data: IP address, browser type, device information (for security and service improvement)
Privacy.section2Item3: Contact you via phone, email, or WhatsApp to confirm reservations and provide support
Privacy.section2Item4: Improve our services and website functionality
Privacy.section2Item5: Send promotional communications (only with your consent)
Privacy.section2Item6: Comply with legal obligations and prevent fraud
Privacy.section3Text: We do not sell your personal information. We share your data only with service providers necessary for fulfilling your bookings (drivers, tour guides) and with payment processors for transaction processing.
Privacy.section3bText: When you submit a booking, our team will contact you via phone, email, or WhatsApp to confirm your reservation, provide payment instructions, and coordinate service details. By submitting a booking you consent to this contact.
Privacy.section4Text: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits to protect your personal information.
Privacy.section5Text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information at any time. Contact us at privacy@drallseasontravel.com for any data-related requests.
Privacy.section6Text: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at privacy@drallseasontravel.com or call +1 (888) 599-8728.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.section1Text: By accessing or using D.R All Season Travel's website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
Terms.section2Intro: To book tours and transfers, you must create an account. You agree to:
Terms.section2Item1: Provide accurate, current, and complete information
Terms.section2Item2: Maintain and update your information as needed
Terms.section2Item3: Keep your password confidential and secure
Terms.section2Item4: Be responsible for all activities under your account
Terms.section2Item5: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access
Terms.section3Text1: All bookings are subject to availability. A booking is confirmed only when you receive a confirmation email.
Terms.section3Text2: All services can be paid upon arrival. We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) and cash. No upfront payment required.
Terms.section4Text: Free cancellation is available up to 24 hours before your scheduled service. Cancellations within 24 hours are non-refundable. Weather-related cancellations receive full refunds.
Terms.section5Text: D.R All Season Travel takes all reasonable precautions to ensure your safety. However, participation in tours and activities is at your own risk. We recommend travel insurance for all guests.
Terms.section6Text: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@drallseasontravel.com or call +1 (888) 599-8728.
